reviews.title: Great location, dated hotel, so-so service
reviews.text:
Perhaps our expectations were too high considering it was a Pullman, but must admit that we felt it was far from a 5-star hotel & far from what we have experienced at previous Pullman stays. While the grounds were beautiful, the beach area perfect and the location great for access to the city (and even a few good local restaurants close by) that is where the 5 star experience ended.

The room was pretty standard with the bare minimum regarding furnishings and extras. The shower was so dirty looking with moldy grout that we were happy the hotel supplied flip flops as we would not have stepped in the shower without something on our feet.  Everyday we had to request something from housekeeping, usually more towels as the shower curtain ended about 1 foot from the floor and much of the bathroom was covered in water after a shower. The room was also in desperate need of a paint job.

The breakfast was plentiful with lots of selection but often the trays were empty unless you were there very early. The tea & coffee were self serve which was not the issue but seldom was your tea or coffee hot. And once again the restaurant, like the hotel room, just looked tired & in desperate need of some fresh paint.

The staff were either very pleasant & friendly or the exact opposite and didn't seem to really care....nothing in between.

But perhaps our lasting impression of the Pullman Beach Resort will be that in over 25 years of traveling all corners of the globe, we have only checked into a hotel room twice and requested housekeeping to the room to clean again.  Always makes for a good story when you return home but certainly doesn't put the Pullman in a good light.

reviews.title: A Fool And His Money Are Soon Parted
reviews.text: Nothing good to say about this hotel at all. When we arrived early (which was arranged in 3 emails to arrive at 10.00 am) we were told to go away until 2.00pm then we can check in. The reception staff were disgraceful, unfriendly, rude and arrogant. When I finally checked in at 2.00pm I was told that "they were busy" and another 40 minutes later we got our room, then no luggage because it was forgotten about and left at reception. From here it just went down hill. They claim to be a 5 star resort, it is actually just barely a 3 star hotel - NOT A RESORT. The absolute rubbish that previous guests have written saying it was fantastic and great staff is just not true. I even emailed the general manager who made no apology and that if I wanted to see he to call and he would try to find the time to see me before i left, this is not close to being satisfactory in what they claim to be 5 star. The pool staff are lazy and allowed children to urinate in the pool actually watching and laughing - maybe its different if your a local maybe the same hygiene rules don't apply. The pictures on the website don't match the actual hotel eg. the gym is barely equipped and is so poorly placed that its not worth going to - the gym is located between the pool toilets and the pool bar area so all the guests and staff use it a short cut and are noisy and distracting when all you want to do is have some quiet time in the gym. Overall food and room service was inconsistent eg order the same dish one night and the serving and food is different the next time despite being charged the same price. Overall I would never ever recommend this hotel to anyone, I wouldn't even send my ex-wife there, its that poor. There is no shuttle bus to take you to Danang (15 minutes away) but the shuttle bus will take you to Hoi An (30 minutes away) nothing makes sense.

reviews.title: Service improvements needed!
reviews.text: Not comfortable. Receptionist who greeted us has no right attitude and manners. The smell of insects repellent (or, kind of stronger!) were follow from the first to forth floor of the hotel and inside the room. The beach side is dirty and we didn't see anyone care about broken glass, cigarettes or plastic bags and small rubbish around and under the sands. The only good service we found was at the restaurant and beach bar. As well as receptionist who was helping us to check out- was good and very well educated. We had 8 hours free after we checked out and we spent it on the beach. We left our baggage at the luggage area together with handbags. The manager told us to take cash and credit cards out as she was not sure about the security and honesty of her colleagues. We took out cash and credit cards from one bag but another. Sure, when we were leaving the money disappeared. The front manager was shouting that it's totally our fault that she was telling us to take it out. The amount of the cash there were not that big. What is the most disappointing that there were nothing like a proper lockers or secure service for such an occasion. Anyway, the sea and weather was good.

reviews.title: Awesome Stay !
reviews.positives:
Everything was awesome ! Staff from reception to concierge , to the house keeping, to restaurants and life guards, everyone was always happy and warm. Staff NY gave us a good start when we check in, patiently helping us on the check in as we were too early  for the check in time, explaining the facilities and program. 
Value add program like Yoga lessons from instructor Thuynguyen was great too, we enjoyed thoroughly.  Free use of surfing board, kayak is really a plus, with such attentive life guards always. The swimming pool itself is big enough for kids to play, and for people who want to do some swimming. 
Breakfast was awesome daily. Had our fill that lunch can be skipped.
One of my friend even got to do baguette lessons with the chef one of the afternoon.

We also had a dinner buffet with good spread of seafood and meat, and wine too!
The resort is sitting on My Khe beach, and guests have a private beach , and the beautiful and clean beach is really a big plus why we choose Pullman resort. We had a good brisk walk daily on the beach for an hour before going for our breakfast. And the best opportunity to catch the sunrise at 5.30am  rising from the horizon of South China Sea. 
Lots of sun loungers to cater for guests with a bar counter and beach lounge. 

Overall, a wonderful stay in Pullman Danang Beach Resort.
reviews.negatives: There were some shades of the coconut trees by the beach which is nice. If it can plant more coconut trees on the beach, the vibes will be even better.

reviews.title: It is just okay and nothing special…
reviews.text: First time staying at Pullman resort…. All the Staff is wonderful, helpful and their English is really good. Last night the room next door to us was being very disruptive and disturbed our sleep. So I contacted the front desk informed them about the situation and they help solved the problem for us. As far as Pullman location I’m not a big fan, the resort is super big and they have the huge extended long infinity pool which make the walk from our hotel room to the pool and the beach pretty far under the scorching hot sun and there was no shade along the pathway . The room has a reeked smell of mold. The bathroom is large and has so many shower heads which can fit a family so that was great. Anyway,  I will most likely  to  not return.  But thank you all the staff, receptionist, room cleaning personnel, bartender you guys are all great lovely people!!

reviews.title: Poor facilities ( 5 nights at Deluxe Bay View Twin Room)
reviews.text:
1. The position of  business table isn't good. The business chair hasn't chair back, so it's inconvenient for working.
2. The carpet in the middle of the room should be removed because It's hard and dirty.
3. The soaking tub must have a non-slip mat inside because it is very slippery. It made me slip and fall painfully.
4. The shower area should have a curtain or sliding door to prevent water from splashing out and wetting the room. The toilet area should also should have a sliding door.
5. Around 3 ~4 am on July/22/2024, I was woken up by the bathroom light suddenly turning on. When I sat up in bed and wondered if anyone could have come into the room, about 5 minutes later the light turned off by itself. So scare!
And many other things that a 5 starts resort need to review and improve.
reviews.response:
Dear Ms. Huong,

Thank you for your recent stay and for taking the time to share your experience at Pullman Danang Beach resort.

We are deeply grateful for your constructive comment and would like to express my sincerest apologies about your inconvenience that you had met during the stay. Kindly be shared that we do have the non-slip mat which is served on request. It was pity that it was not noticed well. Please also rest assured that we are taking the appropriate measures such as the non-slip mat will be ordered and set up in all room soon and the lighting system in room will be checked carefully ..to address the problem and prevent future occurrence. 

Thank you again for your feedback and we hope to have the chance of welcoming you back in the near future when we will strive to make your stay more seamless and enjoyable.

Sincerely,

Tran Thi Minh Thao (Ms.)	
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: A very nice hotel along the beaches of DaNang
reviews.positives: If you want to be on the beach you'll enjoy the Pullman.  We enjoyed laying under umbrellas on the beach having a few drinks.  Although best to do any drinking during happy hour as the prices are a little high for Vietnam.  The room was a nice size, clean with a nice balcony and all areas of the hotel clean.  The hotel has a beautiful pool.  Their breakfast buffets is one of the larger we ran across with good variety of foods choices, but I'd say I wasn't overwhelmed with it.  We like walking the beach in the morning although were surprised with how much debris washes up on the beach.
reviews.negatives: I would say this was a little more expensive than I would expect it to be.  Also I mentioned the debris along the beach, we were there 3 days and walked the beach barefoot and would get a black "tar" like covering on our feet that was hard to wash off.  The street side location takes some walking to get to some of the restaurants.

reviews.title: Hardware is good but more work on staff training
reviews.text:
We stayed at Pullman for 3 nights during Chinese New Year, and it didn't come to our surprise with lots of Mainlander friends.  The overall hardward of the hotel didn't let the name of Pullman (5-star) down, but I found that most of the staff I came across in restaurant, reception and pool side carry an angry faces with them.  And staff at poolside never offered to give you a free bottle of water or provide you with towel, you had to test your luck to locate the beach towel.  Most importantly they were all pretty busy to chit chat with their colleagues and shouted at each others every day.  One day of our stay, the staff came inside of our room to fix a door without notified us.  I was quite surprise with the unexpected visitor and lucky that we were all dressed at that time.
I understand that there is a service gap between Vietname with Bangkok, Phuket and Bali, etc.. Yet there are many big-chain opened new resorts in Danang and staff training is critical to make this city becomes another resort paradise.
reviews.positives: Breakfast variety, free shuttle to airport and Hoi An, nice swimming pool

reviews.title: Fabuleux

reviews.negatives: Ras

reviews.title: Schönes Hotel, Preis-Leistung könnte besser sein
reviews.positives: genügend Platz am Pool und Strand, vielfältiges Frühstücksbuffet, nette Anlage

Sehr hellhörige Zimmer. Vor 08:00 wurde man schon von den rollenden Wagen der Housekeeper am Gang aufgeweckt.
Das Strandresraurant würde ich nicht weiter empfehlen - überteuert und nicht gut. Da bietet sich der Grab-Lieferdienst für einen Snack am Pool wunderbar als Alternative an.
Wir haben am letzten Tag leider etwas bei den Duschen am Pool/Gym liegen lassen. Auf Nachrichten via booking.com wird nicht reagiert, was sehr ärgerlich ist.

reviews.title: Calm, peaceful Hotel
reviews.text: we were not very satisfied with this hotel being that it is a 5 star hotel but the service standard was seriously lacking. staff barely smiled, especially the senses restaurant staff. the staff at the restaurant does not seem to know how to provide normal service. one lady walked away to attend to another customer as i was placing my order with her. we were stunned! the chefs/cooks seems to spend more time talking and fooling around then cooking the food. one other customer waited over an hour for his food and even after his complaint it seems no one was taking it very seriously. there were many vietnamese guest so we think that perhaps this hotel is more catered for them considering the service standard.

reviews.title: top Aufenthalt
reviews.positives: Perfektes Frühstück, viele Speisen werden an der Theke frisch zubereitet. Alles ist sehr schmackhaft und reichhaltig. Das Zimmer war top. Der Strand hat eine super Lage direkt am Hotel mit toller Aussicht.
reviews.negatives: alles gut

reviews.title: An enigma wrapped in a riddle
reviews.text:
Like the title says, this place just confused the heck out of me.  Compared to standard hotels in Vietnam, and throughout much of the rest of my SE Asia trip, this place was great, beautiful, and comfortable.  However, the level of customer service and  limitations of the amenities confused me.

Problems:

 Pool bar/restaurant stops serving food at 9 and is closed by 10.  Lobby and restaurant stops serving food at 10 as well.  No room service after 10.  Pool closes at 6.  Hotel staff kick everyone off the beach at 6.  I understand this is a quiet resort, but since it's pretty desolate in the immediate area, it'd be nice to have access to the features and amenities  later.  

 Location: very inconvenient without your own transportation unless you want to be restricted by the hotel's van.  Cabs are relatively expensive if you're heading into Danang, and certainly expensive if you were to take the 30km trip into Hoi An.  My friend and I rented scooters for the 3 day stay to have a way around.

 Dining: The on-site restaurant and most of the food in the resort are extraordinarily overpriced for their quality.  I was very happy to pay the 10$ for a sandwich, 15$ for an entree, since we were at a resort, but I expected the quality to match.  The breakfast buffet was very good, but dinner was not.
reviews.positives: beautiful rooms and common areas, awesome pool, pristine beach

reviews.title: Hier würde ich sofort wieder hin.
reviews.positives:
Die Zimmer sind groß, sauber, toll ausgestattet. 
Das Personal ist top, super freundlich, interessiert an Konversation und hilfsbereit. 
Das Frühstücksbüffet ist sehr vielfältig und alles schmeckt sehr gut. Zugang zu Strand ist perfekt, Speisen sind mit Allergenen gekennzeichnet, der Chef-Koch ist sehr nett und hilf einem gerne bei der Essensauswahl weiter. 
Das Lobbypersonal ist super hilfsbereit. 

Mit dem Grab-Taxi kommt man für 2€ in die belebten Gegenden von Da Nang. 
Für 10€ kommt man nach Hoi An. Der Shuttle Bus vom Hotel ist günstiger.
reviews.negatives:
Rings um die Strandliegen könnte es etwas sauberer sein. Die Einrichtung im Restaurant ist schon etwas älter und evtl nicht mehr so modisch, aber in gutem Zustand. Die Messer könnten schärfer sein. …also nur Kleinigkeiten. 
Die Speisen und Getränke haben europäisches Niveau und sind für die Region sehr teuer.

reviews.title: Disappointing for a 5-star Danang beach resort
reviews.text: As a top line 5-star beach resort, we had higher expectations for an international brand like Pullman.  This one was a let down: very ordinary and aged feeling room, and an overall resort with the minimum of facilities highlighted by a small pool that was unusable during day time given the unbearable heat without any shade of trees.  The beach access was a plus and the breakfast spread was superb, but did not make up for the overall lower quality of experience.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Thomas,

We appreciate your feedback and thank you for taking the time to write the review. 

While we wish you had better experience with the room condition and the pool service, we are glad to hear that you had found our location and breakfast to be a highlight. 
We are deeply grateful for your constructive comment and wish to have a full renovation in the near future.

Thank you again for your feedback and we hope to have the chance of welcoming you back in the near future when we will strive to make your stay more seamless and enjoyable.

Regard,

Tran Thi Minh Thao (Ms.)	
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Wunderschönes Hotel
reviews.positives: Eine wunderschöne Hotelanlage mit Pool und eigenem Strandabschnitt. Wirklich traumhaft!
reviews.negatives: Das Frühstück ist für umgerechnet 20EUR am Tag einfach zu teuer.

reviews.title: A bit disappointing
reviews.text: I expected quite a lot for Pullman as it is under Accor Group, however I will not choose it again the next time. As a resort hotel, Pullman doesn't have many facilities, only a small swimming pool and a gym. F&B facilities are not great, only a all-day international restaurant and 2 bars. Location wise it is just on My Khe Beach but the beach itself is not attempting at all - big waves and not suitable for swimming. Staff are friendly but English level can be improved. Design of the room is really awful to me - no extra doors for toilet and shower corner apart from the big wooden door which divides the toilet/shower room with the living and sleeping space, that means if I go to take shower, my friend cannot go in the toilet as there is no door inside. The "partition" between the bathtub and the bedroom area can be opened from both direction, means that your friend can open it and watch you to take shower....! Next room should be having party and too noisy, woke us up in 2am!
reviews.response:
Thank you for taking the time to tell us about your experience at the Pullman Danang Beach Resort. 
I am sorry that your experience did not meet your expectations; please allow me to express my sincerest apologies.
We appreciate your sharing your concerns, and it is our hope that you will give us the opportunity to better serve you in the near future.

reviews.title: Schönes Strandhotel mit guten Zimmern und außergewöhnlich gutem Personal.
reviews.positives: Das Personal ist außergewöhnlich freundlich und hilfsbereit. Die Lage des Hotels direkt am Strand mit einem eigenen Abschnitt ist sehr gut. Die Zimmer sind schön und geräumig. Insgesamt haben wir uns sehr wohl gefühlt während unseres Aufenthaltes.
reviews.negatives: Der Spa (Sauna und Dampfbad) und Fitnessbereich ist leider etwas klein und teilweise in die Jahre gekommen. Außerdem könnte die Schallisolierung der Zimmer etwas besser sein, aber es war nicht allzu störend, da es im Hotel insgesamt eher leise war.

We were particularly impressed by the Executive Sous Chef, Victor and his staff!

Sincerely,

reviews.title: Fantástica estadia em Danang
reviews.positives:
Hotel lindo com uma incrível piscina infinita sobre a praia 🏖️!
A localização é excelente pois permite ir de táxi até a My Khe Beach (5 minutos) e regressar a pé pela praia (15 minutos pela areia).
A praia do hotel é semi-privada mas a energia é magnífica e os finais de tarde / pôr-do-sol são inesquecíveis. 
Os restaurantes são de qualidade superior !!

A chegada tivemos um pequeno contratempo com a reserva do quarto e o número de camas (inferior ao pretendido), que foi prontamente resolvido pela equipa do hotel - simpáticos e prestáveis. 

O melhor hotel onde ficamos até ao momento no Vietname.

reviews.title: Service needs improvement
reviews.text: Overall comments that we had – Quality of the room was reasonably good, not luxurious and I would say fair value for money. The spread at the breakfast was good but I spent all my time at the local Vietnamese breakfast section which was pretty good with all the congees and noodles/ pho every day. However, we had a couple of unpleasant experiences during our stay. The shuttle bus to pick us up from Hoi An did not turn up on time and we did not know whether it was coming plus it was pouring that night. We were also thinking of getting a local taxi back but there was no taxis at that time too.Fortunately the pick up from the hotel arrived and we landed back in the hotel. It would be necessary that the hotel ensured that there is prompt pick up and proper communication of any delays say via the bus terminal staff so that hotel guests know what to expect and not have to be left on our own.
reviews.positives: Excellent breakfast

レセプションもホテルサイズにしては人数が少なく、サービスが行き届いてないと感じた。
ゆっくりリゾートを満喫したい人には不向きと感じました。

First and foremost, I would like to sincerely thank you for choosing Pullman Danang Beach Resort for your recent visit. 

We are glad to hear that you had an enjoyable stay with us and found the food quality to be a highlight. However, I am deeply sorry and disappointed to learn that we failed to deliver the exceptional experience we pride ourselves on and that you rightfully expected.

We would like to express our most sincere apologies for your unpleasant experience and we were extremely disappointed to learn that we did not extend our usual warm and caring service at the restaurant. Your concern has been noted carefully by Director of Food and Beverage and necessary steps have been taken to avoid such inconvenience in the future. 

We truly hope to have another chance to demonstrate you that your experience certainly does not reflect our usual level of service we strive for. 

Sincerely, 

Tran Thi Minh Thao (Ms.)		
Guest Experience Manager

Rent a motorcycle and head into da nang toescape the overpriced sea front and experience some amazing food and culture. Definitely would stay here again so long as the process don't go up too much.

reviews.title: Boutique hotel by the sea
reviews.text: Lifestyle Resort is situated just beside the popular Furama hotel. They are both facing the same South China Sea and have a stretch of beautiful clean white beach. We chose Lifestyle over Furama as it was more economical. It had a clean and sleek feel. We encountered a bad sewage smell lurking from the bathroom. Their maintenance guys did not manage to resolve the problem. As we were staying the last night, we didn't take up the hotel's offer of changing rooms. Another issue we had was that the water was cold when returned to the hotel around 9pm, they explained that they switched off the water pump to conserve energy. We had to turn on the water for 10min before it became warm again. I liked the hotel as a whole but our experience could have been better if the 2 issues were resolved.
reviews.positives: Facing the beach

nice hotel, big rooms with a nice big bubble bath tub. 

service - not the best you would expect of a 5 star hotel. restaurant staff are very friendly. however reception's service awful. 

the spa looks nice but the spa manager is lousy. service is not as expected. rushes people through and most unfriendly. like to hard sell their service. we did a couple massage and they sent in a male masssuess. very unprofessional and untrained staff.

kids club is far from main building. very minimum things to do with the most worn out toys. no scheduled activities. will put kids in front of the tv. worst of all kid's club is located next to basement parking for their staff's motorcycle. the whole place is polluted with motorcycle's fumes and smells of oil spill. 

went for the hotel tour, staff actually recommended outside tour and asked to pay upfront. very dodgy dealings and recommends restaurant that is practically abandoned. worst kind of recommendation.

staff will come in to clean the room and turn down despite the "dnd" sign put up. 

during our stay, the hotel actually had a big group of sleazy women with skimpy clothes. they were loud and really brought the image of the hotel down.

Reception stated that  it's going to be no problem since we already have a friend staying there in one fo their villas.  We didn't know our arrival date so it crucial to defer to a later date. I rebooked our flight based on the hotel's response.  We arrived earlier than anticipated. However, upon arrival, the hotel adjusted our arrival day improperly which made me loose one day since they knewI had another booking for Hoi An.  They were very inflexible, unhelpful. Additionally, they put us, two senior citizens far away from the Lobby and breakfast area.  Hence, the walk was arduous and tiring to say the least.  It was not a good introduction to Danang.

reviews.title: Beautiful grounds with no personality
reviews.text:
As you can see in the pictures Lifestyle Resort has beautiful grounds and an amazing pool.  The room was very spacious and had very nice outdoor spaces, including a large dining room table and 2 separate sitting spaces.  The hotel was very clean.  The shuttle service from the airport was prompt and friendly.  The check in process was quick and smooth.  The included breakfast had a great mix of western and asian options.

The biggest opportunity for this resort to become great is for it to create a stronger, personalized holistic experience.  It lacked energy and personality.  It felt sterile and the workers although very nice and accomodating seemed blah.  No passion for the resort or experience.  Because of this it did not feel like a resort.  It felt like a hotel by the beach with a nice pool.  Resorts should create a holistic experience that you want to tell your friends about.  

There was a beautiful pool and an open air restaurant by the pool but no music and it no good system of waiters coming to the pool and taking orders for drinks.  The beach was very clean but very large grounds.  It was annoying to have to walk all of the way to the pool restaurant to order food and then someone would bring it to you and they would be very tired and sweaty from all of the walking.  I highly recommend that the resort invests in more workers to provide bar and beach food service.  Or invest in a separate structure closer to the beach area to service the guests.

Overall I would consider staying here again because of the spacious, clean rooms and beautiful pool but would have better expectations of a boring resort without a lot of energy.
reviews.positives: Grounds were beautiful, great pool, quiet beach, spacious room with great outdoor space

reviews.negatives:
- 7박동안 조식에서 망고가 단 한번 나왔고 그 마저도 양이 적어서 늦게 온 사람들은 먹지도 못함. 따로 주문도 불가능하다고 함.
- 어매니티 퀄리티가 너무 떨어져서 마트에서 별도로 사서 씀
- 호텔이 큰 대로변 앞이라 매연이 너무 심하고 종일 내부 공사중이라 소음과 공사매연에 숙박 내내 목이 안좋았음. 연식이 오래듼 호텔이라해도 이건 좀..
- 체크인 할 때 25만원 더 내고 view 업그레이드를 계속 권유함. 두번 거절했는데도 네고까지 해가며 지속 권유하는게 5성급 호텔에서의 서비스가 맞는지 이해가 안감..
- 저렴한 호텔들 묶어놓은 Accor 체인답게 종합적으로 가격대비 극악임. 1박에 27만원 내고 7박했는데 후회만 가득했음

다낭에 좋은호텔 많아도 너무 많습니다. 좋은곳들 잘 찾아보세요.

reviews.title: Good reception, once past the "gatekeeper"
reviews.text:
My mistake, was under the impression that I had booked a Club/Executive room...(no room types at the resort) so this was a bit of an issue. I arrived early, requested early check-in, was thinking there was a club lounge separate check-in.  However, my greeter informed that check-in was at 1500 hrs (it was 1130), I said no problem, is there a club lounge...she pointed upstairs... to which there was just a room with chairs, cookies, and water, no tv... i laughed a bit... then proceeded back downstairs to reception, avoiding the greeter... The Assistant Manager, took wonderful care of me, as I was just hoping to hold the bags, she checked me into a room, per my request. I was obviously a lucky one, as many others would have to wait until rooms were available.
Good stay. Fun happy hours.

reviews.title: a good 5star hotel
reviews.text:
It was a good stay being that the weather was pretty cold and windy that we weren't able to swim in the ocean. The hotel has some good facilities to keep us busy. They're buffet breakfast was also really good with a lot of choices to choose from.

The only thing that I didn't like was the pillows in the room. All the pillowcases had Velcro on them and they were coming off and would scratch you once in awhile while sleeping. Also the in room plumbing needs work. Our room didn't flush properly and the sink would get stuck once in awhile.

I do appreciate very much our upgrade and the friendliness of the staff. They were there always smiling and quick to respond to any requests in your room. 

I did enjoy my stay here but with the money per room I spent having stayed in a 3 star hotel with great staff service as well, not sure if I had value for my money.

reviews.negatives:
Mình đã đánh giá 5 sao trên tripadvisor vì nhân viên resort nhờ đánh giá và ban đầu không có ý định đánh giá lại qua booking nhưng vì trải nghiệm lần đầu ở resort tệ đến vậy nên xin phép đánh giá lại qua booking.
Gia đình mình đi nghỉ dưỡng và đã đến Đà Nẵng cả chục lần, 3 năm gần đây đều đi Đà Nẵng với mục đích nghỉ dưỡng gia đình nhưng lần đầu tiên trải nghiệm ở resort quá tệ.
Đầu tiên, về chính sách ngân hàng liên kết với resort yêu cầu người booking resort qua Booking.com cần là chính chủ ở phòng mới có thể thanh toán được thì chức năng book hộ phòng trên app có ý nghĩa gì? Mình nhờ người book phòng thêm cho bố mẹ và đã thanh toán nhưng khi đến resort thì nhân viên báo do không phải người book ở nên việc thanh toán sẽ refund lại và cần thanh toán lại và đây là chính sách của ngân hàng liên kết với resort??? Nếu vậy chức năng này trên booking có ý nghĩa gì và khách là mình không hiểu bản chất việc cần chính chủ book mới thanh toán được này là gì trong khi nhân viên chỉ nói đây là chính sách của ngân hàng liên kết với resort. 
Tiếp theo, bãi biển của resort quá đông, không có sự riêng tư. Nhân viên trực ở hồ bơi không rõ làm gì khi khách gặp sự cố ngay trước mặt, bị ngụp nước hồ bơi hô cứu nhưng không một ai nhảy xuống và đứng trên bờ nhìn???
Và cuối cùng là MẤT ĐIỆN LÚC 4h30 sáng??? 
Lần đầu tiên đi ở resort vào mùa hè, có con nhỏ 2 tuổi mất điện lúc 4h30 sáng. Do lỗi mất điện và lỗi chuyển máy phát trong resort đến 15p sau chưa có điện và kết quả là con mình nóng vã mồ hôi, dậy khóc. Thực sự quá tệ, tệ đến mức không bao giờ muốn quay lại resort mặc dù nhân viên belt và lễ tân rất thân thiện nhưng không kéo lại được trải nghiệm quá tệ khi ở resort lần này.

The view is spectacular. The garden is well kept. The room is huge with a big  bathroom complete with a tub which has a sliding door for you to watch TV even on the tub. The hotel is very near to the city center. there are free shuttles on schedule to Hoi An. My family had a great time in Danang on this hotel.

reviews.negatives:
Đồ ăn ở cả 2 nhà hàng menu đều ko ấn tượng, nhà hàng đồ âu thì menu alacarte nghèo nàn, ít món và ko đc ngon cho lắm. Nhà hàng đồ Việt ở cạnh bờ biển thì các món đều quá mặn, mặn chát mà ko có ai tư vấn đồ ăn mặn để hỏi khách có cần giảm độ mặn đi ko. 
Menu buffet sáng cũng đơn sơ ko có nhiều sự lựa chọn, đồ ăn nchung là nhàm chán hơn các nơi khác nhiều.

reviews.title: Great resort & good breakfast
reviews.text: It was service with a smile throught my 4 days stay. the resort also provided a free 30mins shuttle to hoi an. the bed was comfortable and shower was good pressure. breakfast was a huge selection and everywhere you turn, the view of the sea was visible and stunning. there is also a private beach. it's my 2nd visit to the resort and highly recommended.
reviews.positives: Large rooms, comfortable bed & pillow, amazing view of the sea

reviews.title: ok

reviews.positives: beach

reviews.title: Gia đình tôi có những ngày lưu trú rất tuyệt vời và sẽ quay lại Pullman
reviews.positives: Khách sạn có không gian thoáng rộng, biển đẹp và sạch sẽ. Bể bơi rất to, tôi thấy là bể bơi to nhất trong các chuỗi resort ven biển. Phòng khách sạn và nhà vệ sinh bố trí hợp lý, ở thoải mái. Bữa sáng xuất sắc, đa dạng, nhiều món ăn, đồ uống. Gia đình tôi đặc biệt thích quầy trứng và đồ ăn nước (mỳ , phở) . Tôi đánh giá rất cao những chai nước hoa quả đóng chai thủy tinh, thể hiện sự sạch sẽ, tươi mới. Nhà ăn có nhân viên đứng tất cả các vị trí, sẵn sàng hỗ trợ khách gọi đồ uống cafe và hỗ trợ khi cần. Thái độ của toàn bộ nhân viên rất tốt . Cách vận hành chung của khách sạn rất chuyên nghiệp, hiện đại , đẳng cấp, và tôi thấy xứng đáng với giá tiền.
reviews.negatives: Điều tôi thấy hơi phiền là buổi tối có nhiều khách gọi đồ ăn về phòng, sau đó họ để bát đĩa và đồ ăn thừa ra ngoài hành lang. Tuy nhiên vào lúc 7h30 sáng khi tôi đi ăn sáng thì thấy vẫn chưa được dọn. Nó tạo cảm giác không ok vào lúc sáng sớm. Khách sạn có thể bố trí người dọn đồ vào lúc sớm , hoặc nói khách chủ động gọi lễ tân để dọn thay vì các phòng để đồ ăn ra ngoài hành lang.

reviews.title: Beautiful , Luxury Beach Resort
reviews.text:
We lovey almost everything about this beautiful hotel with very nice setting. The Spa, The Gym, The Lovely Garden & Ponds. The only setback is the untrained receptionist who don't seem to know what is customer service all about,we don't find any smile, friendly faces at the reception, and poor service attitude especially the staff who escorted us to the room who makes us feel that it is quite a chores for her. She certainly does not fit to be an ambassador for this 5* resort. 
Nevertheless, I must give a thumb up to the Conceirge Staff and the Restaurant staffs for being so much friendlier and helpful than the receptionist.
reviews.positives: Comfy, Clean and Relaxing

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời. Luôn luôn quay lại nếu có dịp!
reviews.positives: Vị trí, bãi biển, bể bơi, bữa sáng rất tốt. Nhân viên thân thiện.
reviews.negatives: Giá phòng hơi cao. Nên bổ sung nón / mũ trong phòng cho khách.

reviews.title: very nice hotelo
reviews.text: the lifestyle hotel is by the beach. nice place, nice beach with a white sand. pool and gardens are very nice and also you can play tennis. is not near danang city but you can gey a taxi and go there. i recomend the hoi an tour and old village at 20 minutes away the hotel.

Phòng rộng rãi, có đầy đủ có tiện ích trong phòng từ bàn làm việc, tivi kết nối internet, ban công, bồn tắm, ...
Tất cả nhân viên từ bảo vệ, lễ tân, ... cho đến dọn phòng đều vui vẻ và niềm nở với khách hàng.
reviews.negatives: Không có

reviews.title: Nice environment for a luxury retreat
reviews.text: this is a nice and luxuriously equipped hotel. it has a nice beach, a nice swimming pool, very confortable and clean rooms. we also appreciated the free shuttle service to the airport and to the nearby city of hoi an. breakfast was good, but rather typicla of any western 5-star hotel, the local cuisine section could have been a bit more developed. price was reasonable, but at a 5-star hotel level. it is located at the outskirts of danang, so you need to take a taxi if you want to go to town to try the local cuisine. as a counterpart, it is quite close to hoi an, which is worth a visit.
reviews.positives: Confortable rooms, excellent facilities, nice beach

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Тим, сотрудник отеля, просто молодец! Очень активный, всегда помогал, советовал, куда поехать с семьей, вызывал такси и всегда был на связи. Вот такие сотрудники делают отдых лучше!
reviews.negatives: В целом отель понравился, но были два неприятных момента. С карты взяли депозит, но так и не вернули его еще. Девушка на регистрации Софи (кажется) очень долго нас обслуживала, а при выезде потребовала вернуть пляжную сумку, которую мы думали оставить как подарок отеля и сувенир. Сказала, что если не вернем — придется заплатить, что нас очень расстроило. Мы, конечно, сумку вернули, но такой подход нам не понравился и испортил впечатление от отеля.

reviews.title: Great beach, good service and very nice rooms
reviews.text: Other than a very bad reaction so something I had (felt like food poisoning, lasted less than 12 hours), I thought the food was very good.  Perhaps the best breakfast buffet bacon I have found in SE Asia.  English is spoken and easily understood both ways.  Mostly rain (it's rainy season - no surprise), but the beach was still fun.  Significant waves. Too bad I'm not a surfer. Relatively small for a resort (not a problem) and refreshing simplicity.  No shop for snacks, medicines or travel items. Staff quality is 5 star, and the make the best of what is available.
reviews.positives: The beach, the staff, the rooms

reviews.title: Quiet, relaxing stay
reviews.text: We spent 2 nights at the Pullman. Although a little expensive for the quality, we did find the Epice restaurant and staff friendliness outstanding. Downsides were the bathroom needed a refurb, it was looking a bit tired and bath physically creaked when I got in and out. Lounger covers were in need of refreshing. Although saying this, beach was nice, pool ok, bathroom amenities (rainfall shower and bath) were good. We have stayed in much cheaper hotels in the area, 4 star, which we felt were just as good, except for the competence of the staff. Staff are extremely attentive here which makes the hotel gain its stars.
reviews.positives: beach, restaurant, staff

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.negatives: Virkelig god morgenmadsbuffet, men frokost og aftensmaden var lidt kedelig til den pris desværre..

reviews.title: Great stay, great beach
reviews.text:
This is a place to stay if you want some serious relaxation. Hotel is well laid out with an expansive pool and beach area (we were there while some large groups were around, and it didn't feel croweded/noisy)

A little bit far from downtown Danang (8km).  If you want to be near Danang city, this is not the hotel to stay. But if you are looking for sun, sea and relaxation - this is a great choice! I will come back
reviews.positives: Beach and pool area is wonderful, very relaxing

Our room smelt like mildew.

reviews.negatives: Staff were unfriendly and not helpful. Didn't provide the holiday vibe. Very disappointed given the price paid. The smaller resorts offer a better service in the area. Breakfast not included but is at smaller, and cheaper hotels on beach.

reviews.title: Great experience
reviews.text: Good beach, new modern style rooms and very friendly staff. Kid friendly place and the restaurant had good food.

reviews.title: Ideal location great beach
reviews.text: Second visit and seems to get better. Exceeded expectations. Good size very clean rooms, friendly staff nothing too much trouble.  Great facilities and restaurants and the beach is perfect for relaxing no stress not crowded. Plenty to do and see in the area.
reviews.positives: Friendly staff and terrific service

reviews.title: Average hotel, not worth the price
reviews.positives: Good breakfast, not a bad location.
reviews.negatives: Hot water issues everyday, was told to run the hot water for 10-15 minutes before I wanted a shower. Pool is freezing, the kids area lacks much for them to do, the gym is one of the worst hotel gyms I have ever seen. Hotel bar is awful, soulless. Regretted staying here.

reviews.title: Nice and Quiet with Great Service
reviews.text: our stay was relaxing.  the hotel was nice, great service.  pool was nice and clean and the access to the beach was close/easy.  good security and the food at hotel was good.  the hotel is secluded and we did not venture too many times into da nang city, so we ate a lot of hotel food.  all in all it was very nice.  girls loved the pool/beach.  lots of shells in the morning walk!
reviews.positives: Clean, Nice Service, Great Pool and Beach

reviews.title: staffs were nice , breakfast was good
reviews.positives: Proximity to golf courses
reviews.negatives: a bit old

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel, fast service, close to city
reviews.text:
LifeStyle Resort has a really nice high-end spa resort feel to the place, with the amazing water feature that seems to stretch to the horizon, and the open concept all day cafe that really offers beautiful views of the gardens. 

It is a fairly compact hotel, you won't have to walk far to get to your room, and plenty of open space and sunlight.

We stayed in the hotel block, not the villas, and the only downside is there is a fair bit of noise from the corridor, as there is no carpeting to absorb pedestrian noise. So if you are a light sleeper, please bring ear plugs!
reviews.positives: Attractive gardens, spa-like ambience

reviews.title: A little bit below expectation
reviews.positives: Good location on the edge of the city. Comfortable room. Breakfast was a bit disappointing as stock often ran out and not to the quality expected of a 5 star hotel or Pullman. Beautiful looking grounds. Pool would benefit from being heated a few degrees.

reviews.title: Stunning view of the beach
reviews.text: It is a little far from Hoi An and things in the hotel are expensive compared to those in Hoi An.  Nonetheless, the service is good and the hotel rooms are clean and spacious.
reviews.positives: Proximity to private beach, spacious room

reviews.title: Last paradise
reviews.text:
A very fresh high class hotel resort with very good food and friendly service at reasonable prices.

Very gebntle but slightly inexperienced staff which need more focused training in English.
reviews.positives: Sea-beach-spa-food-servce as outstanding

reviews.title: The location has potential, but do not manage it like a cash cow.
reviews.positives:
The breakfast was ok. Also the pool area and beach were very nice. The normal rooms had very nice views of the property and swimmingpool and sea. Do not book the overpriced junior suite! Because you get no nice views and it lacks totally a good atmosphere. 
The concierges were nice and given us a good time after all. Also the use of the free sports bikes was a big plus. The massages was also nice and reasonable priced.  I think i would given the resort a good review when they solved the issue of the room. I think It is not nice to book the second expensive room of the resort and you get a totally different room that was explained on the website of booking. I think it is not acceptable.
reviews.negatives: We have booked a junior suite and we got a spacious room without many windows. There was no nice views and it felt that we got a room at the end of the world. No views to the sea and swimming pool what was especially was explained to us on the website. They offered other rooms to us but all of them was not what we expected. One had the views what we expect but was on the ground floor where everyone was walking by to go the swimming pool. We would like to pay more for a better experience but nothing was offered to us. That was a very bad beginning of our stay. The cleaning ladies and waitress were doing a very good job. But very bad management that not keep in mind the needs of the customer. After two days i have asked again for an other room, but then again they offered us none. The last night there was a poker tournament in the hotel. We had a lot of noice of people shouting in the hallways till 3 o clock in the morning. Wich management thinks it is a good idea to arrange a poker tournament in a five star luxury resort where a lot of people are coming for relaxation.

reviews.title: Its a nice Hotel with friendly staff.
reviews.text:
We had a nice room (very clean and quiet). We missed additional Towel rails in the bad room. Additionally it will be nice if the guest can keep the towels longer if he like.
But general room and as well the way to the room with a stroller is working inside the Hotel very well. It would be great if the Hotel entrance have as well a direct ramp to enter the Hotel with the stroller or wheelchair.
We very happy to find that Hotel!
reviews.positives: Very nice fresh Breakfast Buffet

reviews.title: Location is good, but not worth the money
reviews.positives: The location was great
reviews.negatives: The staff wasn’t overly friendly. For the price i was expecting amazing and it was only “ok” restaurants and bars close at 10. For two nights there was a private event so you couldn’t use beach facilities. I would have chosen somewhere else.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Breakfast should be added more dishes
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Long,

Thank you very much for your excellent rating and for choosing to stay with us.

We are delighted to know you had a positive experience overall. At the same time, we truly appreciate your suggestion regarding breakfast variety. Your feedback has been well noted and shared with our culinary team as we continuously look for ways to enhance our offerings and provide a more diverse selection for our guests.

We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back again soon.

Sincerely, 

Tran Thi Minh Thao (Ms.)		
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Decent stay if the sound-proofing issue is managed.
reviews.positives: Rooms were spacious. All the staff were very courteous and always had a smile on their face. Check-in & Check-out process was smooth and with no hassle. Breakfast was decent with an extremely wide variety of choices from Vietnamese, Western and Asian dishes
reviews.negatives:
The sound-proofing of the hotel is non-existent. You can hear everything from your room, the doors slamming shut, dishes and plates being picked up, people chit chatting, footsteps, you get the idea. It just about ruins everything basically. Bathroom design is kinda weird with the rain shower being 2 steps away from the shower controls. 
Reception area is boring and plain. Nothing that screams class or the standards of Pullman that I am used to.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The bellman and restaurant staff were particularly polite and attentive. They were very thoughtful. Breakfast had a variety of options and you could take your time. Especially, there were many types of beverages. If you have time, you can swim in the pool even in December (it gets cold, so it's difficult after the evening). The room is comfortable as well. Instead of checking the map, you can even walk to My Khe Beach, and using Grab makes transportation easy. There is a deposit required (refunded the next day).
reviews.response:
Dear SATOMI san,

Thank you very much for your wonderful feedback. 

We are delighted to hear that our bellmen and restaurant staff provided attentive and thoughtful service, and that you enjoyed our breakfast selection and drink variety.

We are also glad that you found the rooms comfortable and appreciated our convenient location within walking distance to My Khe Beach, as well as easy access via Grab. It’s great to hear that you were able to enjoy the pool in December, despite the cooler weather later in the day.

Thank you again for taking the time to share your experience. We hope to welcome you back for another enjoyable stay soon!

Sincerely, 

Tran Thi Minh Thao (Ms.)		
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Pretty standard resort
reviews.positives: Good Breakfast, location on the beach was good. Room was fine with a big bathroom.
reviews.negatives: The water feature through the middle of the hotel was a waste of space. Would've been better if that was the pool with cabanas and garden around it.

reviews.title: Da Nang First time
reviews.text: What makes this place is the location and fantastic staff. Room a tad bit dated. Location second to none. Shout out to Sophie, Sang, Ahn and others that made us feel like family.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Amir, 

We are glad to hear that you had an enjoyable stay with us and found our location and fantastic staff to be a highlight. 

I am very happy to hear that our Front Desk team had done an exceptional job in taking care of you during your stay. I will definitely share your lovely comments with Sophie, Sang, Anh.

Thank you so much again for choosing Pullman Danang Beach resort.

Sincerely, 

Tran Thi Minh Thao (Ms.) 
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: The beach and breakfast are the best part.
reviews.positives: The grounds and pool/beach area are beautiful. The room was nice and big with a good sized balcony. The breakfast was amazing. Best breakfast of the holiday.
reviews.negatives: The bed was so uncomfortable. Hard as a rock. No vegetarian meal options on the room service menu. And there was no vibe in the hotel. Although it was a full booked it seemed almost empty most of the time. Could do with more entertainment.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Location of the hotel is ideal, at the centre of the city. Overall conditions are good except sauna and steam facilities need much improvement. (Not hot even they have been switched on more than an hour.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. CHIKEUNG,

Thank you for taking the time to share your recent experience at Pullman Danang Beach Resort. It was a delight to learn that overall you had a positive experience here and had found our location to be a highlight. 

While we wish you have had better experience, the constructive feedback like yours is what we could learn from and to improve our guest's experience. Please rest assure that "issues" you had faced were discussing among management team and this is already put on "to do list" for maintain team. 

Your feedback is very appreciated and hopefully your next visit will be a flawless one. 

Sincerely, 

Tran Thi Minh Thao (Ms.)		
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: We really liked our stay. It would have been perfect if we had better nights sleep.
reviews.positives:
It is an incredible looking facility. Probably one of the best looking hotels that we have stayed in. 

The Staff on reception and Guest service were so nice!
reviews.negatives:
Two things that we weren’t particularly impressed with though was how slow it was to get our food in the main restaurant. All good came out at different times over a period of around 1.5 Hours. My wife was eating when the whole family had finished! 

The other note was that the soundproofing of the rooms were shockingly bad. We could hear people throughout the night. I’m sure there were Elephants in the room above.

reviews.title: Nice hotel - go at the right time of the year!
reviews.text:
Nice hotel - located in a quieter part of Danang. Rooms were spacious enough - clean. Friendly staff. A good buffet style breakfast. They have a kid's playroom with staff.

We visited at the end of December - the end of monsoon season - so the weather wasn't great. Drizzle or rain for our stay there. Weather not good/hot enough to use the pool or beach.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Wai,

Thank you so much for your review. 

I am so happy to hear that you enjoyed your stay here with us, especially with the convenience of being located to all things that count.  Although the weather was unfortunate, we are glad that it did not take away from your overall experience. 

Thank you so much for letting us take care of you. We can’t wait to have you here on your next visit soon! .

Sincerely, 

Tran Thi Minh Thao (Ms.)		
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
Love the huge one bedroom cottage.
Hotel pool is very big and nice next to a quiet private beach. Just too bad the weather was too hot even from 8AM in morning so we couldnt enjoy much outdoor.

One complain we had was that the hotel next door had an event with loud noise, and our cottage is located nearest to beach so the noise were really loud from our room. We were initially told it will last until 10PM then it got extended till midnight and when we complained they just told us its decision from other hotel so they couldnt do anything. The hotel did offer us to move to another room but moving room in the middle of the night with baby and loads of equipments was really not an option. After much complaining the hotel compensated us with free transfer to Bana Hill and upgraded our room in Mercure Bana Hill since it's from same group. 

Overall we love the cottage and facilities but less one star due to the bad experience with the way hotel handling the noise issue.
reviews.response:

Sincerely,

Tran Thi Minh Thao (Ms.)	
Guest Service Manager

reviews.text:
Overall stay was good, service and facilty. large swimming pool and beach, gym. also good guidedance from the touristing desk.

A few things to point out, the dessert bar at breakfast could be better; and one day while eating found a salty duck egg turned bad with bad food smell and taste. Was bad experience,  the staff took the case quickly and went investigation. But no more follow up after that. was disappointed.

Apart from this, the chimney near the lobby was constantly producing grey smoke especially in the evening. It creates polution and also we had concerns for opening windows when our cottage is right next to the it. Didn't expect that for a seaside resort.

reviews.title: Good value for money

Nice BF buffet and the Accommodation was  good to. A bit to hot at the outside living space and the house should have a private pool. Its such a big garden and space enough for a pool.
The lunch menue at the beach restaurant was lousy and most of the standard menu was not available due to Corona period. However, a 5 star hotel need to keep their standards even in time of Corona

reviews.negatives: No option to log into own account for Netflix, and hotel netflix account perpetually could not work as too many devices streaming concurrently

reviews.title: Not that worth of money
reviews.text: The room is spacious and with good facilities. However, activities are only provided within just an hour. It may not match with your schedule. Not much facilities within the hotel.

reviews.title: Love our room and the hotel. Will consider coning back if we visit Danang again

Very good location: On the beach and located near shops and not far off from the town/city. Good breakfast spread.
reviews.negatives:
Green netting on the beach near the pool ruins the view.
A bit challenging to communicate with staff as their English language proficiency quite low.

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: This hotel is lovely but for us too pricey and not enough around it

reviews.title: A lovely place to stay but comes at a cost
reviews.positives: Excellent facilities and Location.
reviews.negatives: Very expensive for anything at the property.

reviews.title: Some goods & bads
reviews.text:
Good: Excellent view and pool facilities. Private Beach for guests use. Staff are helpful to arrange connecting rooms after arrival. 
Bad: Power problem on in-room card reader system (fixed on the same day),  Mutiple Power loss on 2/F (cannot be fixed at check-out date and suspected overloading)
reviews.response:
Thank you for taking the time to tell us about your experience at the Pullman Danang Beach Resort. 
I am sorry that your experience did not meet your expectations; please allow me to express my sincerest apologies.
We are having appropriate action to make sure this kind of problem will not happen again.
Hope you let us a chance to better serve you in the future.
Thank you.

reviews.title: Relaxing resort
reviews.positives:
Quite a nice and relaxing stay- it was very quiet throughout the whole hotel with not many people around, however, was off peak season. 
The rooms were clean, tidy and comfortable. 
Decent location as situated on the beach, and if you’re happy to walk around 15 mins to a more busy area. Staff were readily available and friendly however were quick to up sell / let you know of additional prices.
reviews.negatives:
Quite expensive for what it is in terms of quality; compared to other similar priced 5 star hotels in Vietnam. Seemed to be very money orientated where from check in, was provided a list of damage / loss costs which was strange, to the mini bar being taken away as we did not have VND to hand for a deposit although we offered to exchange some AUD and pay. 
Any additional things, you will be charged for. Room was supposed to be a bay view but had limited view of the bay on level 4 and a cost to upgrade to a higher floor / closer to the beach. 
Breakfast was overly priced, with what seemed as a lot of not much where options were fairly limited especially if you don’t like seafood and are staying a good few days. 
Have to purchase tennis balls and hire rackets to use the court, again at an inflated price. 
Spa was quite expensive, jacuzzi was room temperature-not heated and pretty boring. 
Beach out front had a lot of washed up litter, ended up doing a family litter pick in front and around the hotel beach. 
Overall: on the lower end of a 5 star resort.

This was great until happy hour every day when the bass music was played on the beach reverberating through the room and removing the peaceful ambience that always used to exist in this hotel. Pullman Danang should not need gimmicks, it is an amazing location with great views, a beach bar with cocktails, no need for booming music at all.

reviews.title: excellent.
reviews.positives: Swimming pool was really great, amazing staff (with one exception at check-in), wi-fi, beach. Laundry was good. Room service. TV with plenty of channels to choose from (it does rain in Da Nang in December).
reviews.negatives: Minibar was emptied because I did not like the deposit idea. Same thing with my friend at check-in. Once we put this behind us we had a great time.

reviews.title: A Picturesque Resort with a few Hiccups...
reviews.positives: The suite was well appointed with all the amenities one could ask for. The rooms were spacious and clean. The Breakfast was excellent. The facilities were great.
reviews.negatives:
It seems like the staff need better training when dealing with customers as we faced some issues.
When we checked in, we had opted for an extra bed which was included in our room rate, but we were told that it would cost extra. After showing the staff the booking.com screenshot and after much deliberation, they finally conceded that it was included. 
The breakfast staff made it a habit to let us know that we would have to pay extra for the child's breakfast which was not included in our room rate. Once again we had to keep showing them the screenshot which clearly mentions that the rate was inclusive of breakfast for all persons. This became a joke for us daily.
In all the staff were very friendly but could not take any decisions and had to refer to their managers for all queries.

reviews.title: Good value and fun
reviews.text: Hotel is on a stretch of long and wide beach, which is very clean. There is a little playground on the beach for kids. The hotel restaurant has good food but a little pricey. Rooms are comfortable and staff friendly

reviews.title: Great service, beautiful room and gardens

reviews.title: Great staff, good location, but expensive for what it is.
reviews.positives: Lovely staff at this hotel, with a great location on Da Nang beachfront and a 10-15 minute walk to the main tourist areas. Fabulous breakfast.
reviews.negatives: This was by far the dearest hotel on our tour of Vietnam, and for the price, I expected a little bit more. Its not the same standard as other Pullman Hotels in Europe and the Middle East. I’m nitpicking, but for the price I would have expected a turn-down service and mattresses on the uncomfortable sun beds. I also would have expected one of the two bars to stay open past 10pm. Those are minor details and had the hotel been more reasonably priced, I wouldn’t mention them.

reviews.text: We really enjoyed being able to relax in the dining car, it made all the difference. The service on the train and at the hotel was exceptionally good. the staff were consistently friendly and helpful. Early check ins and late check outs at no extra cost made it even easier. The buffet breakfast was good. The only drawback was that the complimentary evening meal we were offered as part of the package at the hotel was extremely disappointing.

Staff were excellent. Jenny on reception and Lan both outstanding customer service 🙂
reviews.negatives: Bit far away from town, but Grab cheap enough

reviews.title: a great holiday for my wife and me
reviews.text: This was one of the best holidays we have in years - the breathtaking view of the ocean right from the hotel reception, the attitude and courtesy extended by the staff and the manager as soon as we arrive, the room, the restaurents, the spa, the pool - endless moments of happiness - every dollar worth spend! A special word of thank to the chef - who makes tailor made delicacies for us each night - we never expect to have such good food. This speaks volume about the effort of the managers and leaders in each aspect of the management who puts great thoughts, develop the right policy guidelines and train their people relentlessly - me comming from a hospitality industry - knows perfectly well how hard and tiresome this is to receive appreciation from the customers - I would definitely like to go back to the hotel again to spend a long week...
reviews.positives: Staff Aiitude, Management Attitude, Cleanliness and Food

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
I had a wonderful stay at Pullman. The staff were genuinely lovely and incredibly accommodating with my food intolerances, which made a huge difference to my experience.
The location is excellent — right on the beach — and the grounds are massive, beautifully maintained, and very peaceful. I stayed in a penthouse suite, which was absolutely amazing. Being able to hear the waves from the balcony was a real highlight, and the private jacuzzi was a lovely touch.
The hotel feels spacious and relaxing, and everything is very well organised. The gym was fine, though I do think it could be more extensive for a resort of this size.
Overall, a great stay with warm, attentive staff, a fantastic beachfront setting, and a very high standard of accommodation

Daisy was amazing also
reviews.negatives: Gym could he improved. Hotel is very solid but could be updated in areas

reviews.title: great location but no acoustics in room
reviews.text: all public spaces in this hotel are fantastic. This use to be a Life Resort that was converted to a pullman so it does look very eco-friendly. the pool is open until +10PM so it is a chance for a night swim if desired. the surrounding are incredible by day and more at night. The rooms are superb. clean and comfortable. the Employees are very attentive to all our requests. All was great until we decided to settle down for the night. It is when the lack of acoustics between the rooms became evident. our neighbour decided to party until 3 am and we could hear all of their murmurs. THe hotel is also family friendly so family will usually have more than one room and you can hear every time a door is shut. All the hard surfaces in the corridor create the sensation that you are sleeping next to a train track everytime someone with suitcase walk by. all in all facility would be better without the room noise.
reviews.positives: pool, empty beach, surrounding

reviews.title: Would stay again
reviews.positives: Service of staff was excellent, in particular guest service personel Nick. Helpful and friendly
reviews.negatives: Nil

reviews.title: Beautiful getaway
reviews.text:
Our stay at the Pullman was wonderful. The ample breakfast was a very great way yo start the day. Though the hotel has a family atmosphere, couples can still enjoy themselves. Loved having a morning and afternoon shuttle to Hoi Ann...because there's not a lot in Da Nang. Wish the shuttle came back later...or that we just stayed in Hoi Ann all together. Still, Day Nang was quaint and the hotel was great. 

The only thing that wasn't so wonderful was the spa services. They use cheap nail polish so a manicure/pedicure from there won't go very far. The massages were just okay for me. (My boyfriend liked his. Not "loved," but just liked.) There were additional taxes/fees for all spa services that aren't listed on the original price list, so that was a bit shady. All in all, that's the only questionable thing about the hotel. The facility looks new, the staff is uber friendly, and they offer free service to/from the airport.
reviews.positives: breakfast, private beach, service

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.negatives: The chairs in the dining room are very noisy when moved. Felt pads under the legs would fix this. There is no general sitting area that is air conditioned for relief from the heat.

reviews.title: It was a pleasant stay. Consider coming back

I am very happy to stay here for 3 days 2 nights. The only comment is slow check in & check out procedure.

reviews.text: Pool and beach are good although cold when the weather turned bad as it did for half our four-day stay in March 2012. Didn't seem to be a popular hotel as not as many guests as its neighbour. Food at restaurant is good, although a bit exxy. I had the best piece of Aussie steak I've had in a long time here on our first night. Breakfast has ample selections and doesn't close until 1030 so no need to rush in the morning. Not much for kids to do if you can't use pool or beach. No DVD player in our Superior room.
reviews.positives: Not crowded

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
There were so many staff and every single one was exceptionally friendly and helpful.
The kids club was great. I was worried my 7 year old might be too old, but there was enough to keep her entertained a couple of hours a day.
Only one pool but it was a very good one.
The beach was lovely. Surprisingly clean and nice for swimming.

reviews.title: Location and serenity
reviews.text: we loved our stay here. it was clean, friendly staff, great location, food was great and a great view from the bar and pool bar
reviews.positives: Great breakfast. Friendly staff.

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.title: Lovely hotel, spacious room, superb beach view.
reviews.text: I'll definitely recommend this hotel to anybody who want to visit Danang. Just 10min drive to airport.
reviews.positives: Friendly staff, good breakfast, hv free return airport transfer & shuttle van to Hoi An city.

reviews.title: Pullman Resort Denang: come rain or shine you're gonna LOVE it here
reviews.positives: Despite this being off-season our experience at the Pullman Resort Danang was most excellent. The hotel is gorgeous, the rooms just brilliant, the food (at the main restaurant) delicious, the staff just wonderful and location location location... It's a must-try if you happen to be in Danang. We'll certainly be going back to stay there again. It was one of the best hotels we have stayed at in Asia. We just loved it.
reviews.negatives: Azure restaurant was very 'meh' compared to the main restaurant. It was also the beach restaurant, so I would have thought it would have had more allure. Food was ever so, so so. This is the only thing I can actually 'fault' at the Pullman.

reviews.title: Relaxed environment, customer service with a smile
reviews.text:
We were extremely happy with the service, accommodation and quality and affordability of the food.  The Spa services had great variety which we took regular advantage of.
The spaciousness of the Penthouse apartment made this worth the additional cost.
The staff were very eager to please and forthcoming with suggestions on how to best spend our time in the region.  
Occasionally there were some challenges with language but all the staff were eager to engage in discussion with the guests, in part to improve on skills essential to working in this industry.
We had a wonderful time and highly recommend this Resort...
reviews.positives: Quality food, extremely helpful staff, excellent room

reviews.title: Slightly expensive looking at other resorts in Danang.
reviews.positives: The location was right on the beach , staff was excellent , response time of the staff was beyond expectation despite being almost fully occupied rooms were very specious. The buffet breakfast had lots of options , continental to local .

reviews.title: Friendly hotel
reviews.text:
Friendly service, quite, clean nice rooms at the superior level. good and high quality interior inside the rooms, nice balcony and view. a nice beach and a quality restaurant with a good selection of national and international food.
good is the airport shuttle service because the hotel is around 15 minutes far away from the city and the airport of Da Nang.
reviews.positives: How the hotel is build

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The breakfast is really good and there are many different choices.

reviews.title: Junior suite was great
reviews.text:
We stayed in a Junior Suite and it was heavenly! Small touches like water provided in the airport coach transfer, the welcome drinks at the lobby, daily small tokens such as biscuits and marshmallows were a bonus! 

The rooms were huge and finely furnished! The hotel were well maintained. The beach was smoothed almost every morning. The pool is beautiful! We had a really great stay and celebrated our first year anniversary there. We received flowers and a heart shaped cake on the day itself! 

Overall it was a memorable experience with a occasional hiccup like communication. That was understandable given that the people does not speak alot of English but the hotel takes effort in ensuring the staff improves on that by providing English lesson! Well
Done! 

The resort made our stay at Danang really memorable and that daily shuttles to hoi an was another bonus! 

We love it! Thanks you!

reviews.title: A conventional beach hotel, suitable for vacationing.
reviews.text:
I checked into a standard twin room at the beginning of April, located on the 2nd floor. The room is not very large, but the air conditioning is great and refreshing. There were no comments about geckos or insects, so there is no need to worry about cleanliness. The staff is very friendly. I wanted to join a paid yoga class, but there was only one class from 6-7 am, which was too early. Using the sports facilities also requires payment. The pool is outdoors, and going there at noon allows you to enjoy the intense sunlight.

However, I am not accustomed to the bathroom being separated from the room only by a piece of transparent glass. Although there is a curtain that can be lowered, it does not provide enough coverage, and I could see my friend’s faint silhouette undressing behind the glass, which was somewhat awkward. There could be more hooks in the bathroom. The water pressure of the shower was quite weak, so I gave up washing my hair in the room and went to the spa center (where I could use the sauna and shower for free).
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. KA,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your detailed feedback following your stay with us.

We are pleased to know that you found your room clean and comfortable, enjoyed the refreshing air-conditioning, and appreciated the friendliness of our team. It is also reassuring to hear that your stay was not affected by the cleanliness concerns mentioned in other reviews.

Regarding the yoga class, we would like to kindly clarify that the 6–7 AM session is a complimentary group class, while paid yoga sessions can be arranged upon request at a preferred time. We are sorry for any misunderstanding this may have caused.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced with the bathroom layout, privacy concerns, limited hooks, and weak shower pressure. Your comments are very important to us and have been shared with the relevant departments for careful review and improvement.

We truly appreciate your feedback and hope to have the opportunity

reviews.text: I decided to stay here again because my previous stay was very pleasant. The breakfast has a wide variety and is delicious. This time the weather was bad so I couldn't enjoy the beach, but when the weather is nice, the hotel's private beach is amazing. The staff is very kind, and I would like to stay here again when I visit Da Nang.

It’s wonderful to hear that you enjoyed our breakfast with its wide variety of options. We’re sorry that the weather did not allow you to fully enjoy the beach this time, but we’re glad you still had a pleasant stay and appreciated the friendliness of our team.

We truly appreciate your continued trust and look forward to welcoming you back on your next visit to Danang for another memorable experience.

Sincerely, 

Tran Thi Minh Thao (Ms.)		
Guest Experience Manager

​Upon arrival, I realized I had left my phone in the car. I spoke with Emmy at the concierge desk, and she was incredibly helpful and kind in resolving the issue. I am truly grateful for her support. Every staff member I encountered was also very friendly and always greeted me with a smile.
reviews.negatives:
​The only minor downside was the loud karaoke coming 
from an event at the neighboring hotel, which affected the atmosphere a bit. However, this was outside of the hotel’s control, so it couldn’t be helped.
​Overall, it was a fantastic experience. Thank you for a lovely stay!

My husband and I have travelled extensively around Asia, the reason we went back to the Pullman is because of the staff. Everyone we met were friendly,attentive and genuine.  If you are visiting Da Nang you will not be disappointed staying at the Pullman.
